title: Bootstrap p-value could report 0.0000 (Monte-Carlo overclaim)
description: pairedBootstrap computed extreme/nResamples, returning p=0 when no centered resample was as extreme as observed (surfaced in discriminate + report.ts). Fixed with Davison-Hinkley add-one (extreme+1)/(N+1). Reporting-only, no score change, no version bump.

title: Stratified per-cell n + bootstrap CI surfacing
description: Ensure thin per-stratum cells are visibly uncertain (n + CI) instead of silently dropped. Additive only, aggregate-only preserved.

title: Anti-HealthBench: lock no-aesthetic-score invariants
description: Regression suite proving form never rescues substance (fluent report omitting a critical finding FAILS), ugliness never punishes (terse complete report not failed for form), no communication/prose dimension exists, and a single critical failure gates rather than being averaged away (gate not weighted mean).

title: regularizedGammaP continued-fraction branch numerically broken (dormant landmine)
description: The x>=a+1 Lentz branch in stats.ts never reciprocated c and used an inconsistent b, diverging (~1e27) for half-integer a (chi2 df=1,3). Dormant (only caller mcNemarTest uses df=1 via erf special-case) but a fabricated-p=0 landmine for any future df!=1 use. Fixed with standard NR modified-Lentz gcf. Non-scoring (stats.ts not in DEFAULT_SCORING_FILES), no version bump.

title: pt-BR R02 laterality-swap detection dead (consonant-stem word boundary)
description: R02 swap regexes /\b(?:direit|right)\b/ and /\b(?:esquerd|left)\b/ never match Portuguese vowel-ending laterality words, so a swap masked by contralateral-normal documentation passed the critical R02 gate on pt-BR. Fixed with vowel-aware stems direit[ao]s?/esquerd[ao]s?. v3.6.0.

title: Consider TERM as compliance floor, not compensatory score
description: TERM is 20% and is a form dimension. Risk: a clinically weak report (QUAL low) with perfect TERM could be lifted toward PASS by the 20% form weight. Proposal/test: a report missing a MAJOR finding with perfect TERM must not reach PASS. Evaluate making TERM a gate/floor rather than a compensable score. Scoring-affecting; gate behind scoringVersion + tests.

title: Unify clause-scoped gold-label negation across CRIT and QUAL (shared helper)
description: After v3.8.0, isScoredCriticalLabel (CRIT) is clause-scoped but qual.ts polarityConcordant goldNegated still uses whole-string hasNegationCue(gold.finding), so CRIT and QUAL can disagree on a compound affirmed gold label. Extract a shared clause-scoped gold-label-negation helper and use it in both, plus the QUAL candidate side (qual.ts:252). Broader polarity blast radius -> dedicated tested iteration. Anchor-less compound non-critical findings (e.g. 'splenic laceration, without extravasation') remain whole-string in QUAL.

title: Send normalized plain text to the judge, not styled HTML
description: buildJudgePrompt passes REPORT_HTML with formatting; a model judge can carry a fluent/pretty-formatting bias (same failure mode as HealthBench GPT grader). Proposal: strip tags / send normalized text to the judge to remove visual bias. conservative-min already prevents upward inflation; this removes residual bias. Live-judge behavior change -> validate before landing.

title: Extract scoring cutoffs into named policy constants
description: Magic numbers 84/80/70/60/59.9/50/20 are literals in scoring.ts. Only passThreshold/partialThreshold are policy-aware; caps (59.9, 99.9-4w) ignore policy. Proposal: name them in one table tied to PolicyProfile. Pure refactor IF it does not change any score; otherwise scoringVersion bump. Lock current numbers with tests first.

title: Tighten open-vs-closed positioning in README/copy
description: Make unmistakable that Pro gold is controlled aggregate-only and NOT downloadable; the separate public LAIBench 2670-case set is the open artifact. Add synthetic + senior-radiologist-reviewed (Sao Paulo/SP, Brazil) provenance disclosure. CHANGELOG updated.

title: pt-BR bare pertinent negatives force-FAILed correct reports (sentence-level negation)
description: extractCriticalMentions used isNegated (locale negationPatterns only); pt-BR lacked bare cues so 'Sem hemorragia'/'Sem fratura' surfaced as unexpected criticals -> hard FAIL on the no-gold path. Fixed with clause-scoped isFindingNegated on the matched term; also stops over-suppressing affirmed criticals in mixed sentences (both locales). v3.5.0.

title: Sweep console noise, dead code, stray TODO; keep any-count zero
description: Resolve or convert the single TODO; confirm zero any-types; remove stray console noise.

title: Harden synthesis detector (QG06) against padding
description: synthesisPenalty fires on high copy + low added-token count, so adding filler/synonyms inflates addedTokenCount and escapes it without real synthesis (aesthetic-gaming vector). Proposal: require added tokens to have clinical overlap with gold/source (clinicalTokenCoverage) before they count as synthesis. Scoring change -> needs scoringVersion bump + regression tests (paraphrase passes, padding does not).

title: Split src/cli.ts into per-subcommand modules
description: Mechanical extraction of ~976-LOC cli.ts into src/cli/ with thin dispatcher. Zero behavior change, no flag/subcommand renames, scoringVersion untouched. Deferred under minimal-change posture; high regression risk vs low credibility value.

title: Unify critical severity cap across both scorers
description: scoreDimensions applies a per-dimension critical cap (60/40/20) but scoreDimensionsWithEvaluators does not (evaluator score overrides). Production uses the latter when evaluators exist, so per-dimension numbers differ with/without evaluators. README justifies it (global gate handles criticals) but the divergence is unmarked. Document inline or unify. Scoring-sensitive.

title: Leaderboard COI mitigation: segregate + disclose external rows
description: Public board must display external/raw-model comparison rows in a clearly separated section, never ranked against the first-party product agent, with a methodology/disclosure line. Cover segregation logic with tests. guard:public must stay green.

title: Matcher synonym/abbreviation expansion (lazy, locale-scoped)
description: Add small locale-scoped synonym/abbrev table feeding the lexical matcher; prove paraphrase/abbrev cases match without new false positives. Risk of score drift -> if unsafe, downgrade to docstring + this issue. scoringVersion bump iff scoring math changes.

title: Downgrade confidence to low on large det-vs-judge disagreement
description: combineScores never returns confidence=low when a judge is present; a large |det - judge| gap (e.g. 95 vs 40) is the strongest low-confidence signal yet caps at medium. Proposal: low when the gap exceeds a threshold. Reporting-only (does not change scores), but add a test.

title: Critical-gate escape: confirmed finding + recommendation dropped as management
description: isManagementOrDifferentialGold matched the whole gold string, so 'massa suspeita, recomenda-se biopsia' was classified management and dropped from criticalLabels/scoredGoldFindings -> omitting it triggered no CG01/CG02/QG02 (CRIT could reach 100). Fixed: hedge/differential short-circuit + clause-stripped management check. v3.4.0.

title: Audit Laudos.AI 120-case score deductions
description: Decompose every failed/deducting score in the Laudos.AI 120-case run and classify whether each deduction is clinical/safety/fidelity/contract/guideline/operational versus purely aesthetic. Aesthetic-only penalties should be treated as benchmark bugs.
close_reason: Audited all Laudos.AI 120-case deductions, fixed evaluator false positives/aesthetic-only scoring, generated local before/after audit artifacts, and updated public aggregate leaderboard to calibrated 90.0% score.

title: Fix site regression and run 120-report model benchmark
description: Fix duplicate Methods/navigation and desktop layout regressions, validate site in browser, run 120 Laudos.AI reports, and benchmark top 5 free/open-source non-Anthropic/non-GPT models with rate-limit-safe throttling.
notes: Public-safe scrub complete: removed private/case-level artifacts from Git index, redacted public demo cases to input-only, updated pt-BR suite to aggregate-only, fixed 120-case leaderboard copy/layout, and verified critical failures hard-gate cases. Gates passed: npm test, npm run typecheck, npm run guard:public, npm run smoke:mock.

title: Complete free/open model matrix after public-safe release
description: Resume the 5-model OpenRouter free/open benchmark only after public-safe release is pushed. Current completed artifact: Poolside Laguna M.1 120-case run at 74.3% clinical; Nex-N2-Pro partial was stopped and should not be treated as final. Keep concurrency=1 and avoid rate limits.

title: Measurement preservation used substring, scored size errors as correct
description: measurementPresent in qual.ts and structural.ts used normalizedReport.includes(measurement), so gold 2cm matched inside 12cm (QG04, R04, QUAL partial bonus). Fixed with exact left-boundary matching (?<![\d.]). v3.2.0 + CHANGELOG + measurement.test.ts.

title: Gold-critical gate dropped compound affirmed criticals (whole-string negation)
description: isScoredCriticalLabel used whole-label hasNegationCue, so 'Acute hemorrhage, no midline shift' was dropped from criticalLabels -> a model omitting the affirmed critical escaped the FAIL veto. Fixed with clause-scoped anchor logic + safe whole-label fallback for anchor-less labels. v3.8.0.

title: External radiologist adjudication readiness (human-gated)
description: Spec a protocol for an independent SP/Brazil radiologist to adjudicate a sample, compute vendor-vs-external Cohen kappa via src/kappa.ts, publish kappa as a credibility seal. Reference docs/radiologist-adjudication-protocol.md. CANNOT be coded; do not fabricate the kappa.

title: Structured logger for adjudication.ts and release-guard.ts
description: Replace ad hoc console.log with a tiny internal leveled logger (info/warn/error), machine-parseable, no new dep. Keep human readability and release-guard exit codes.

title: Judge score-scale inflation fix (safety direction)
description: combineScores per-value <=5 ? *20 inflated catastrophic 0-100 dims (e.g. CRIT=3 -> 60) across the 5/6 boundary. Fixed via result-level Likert detection. Boundary tests at 0/1/5/6/100. Scoring change -> v3.1.0 + CHANGELOG.
